players.name: Xeebs
matchupItemFlags: no magic resist vs a 3-magical enemy comp

diagnostics.headline: CS/min 8.8 vs your 6.5 norm — above your level

flags: our damage is 4/5 physical — one enemy armor item blunts most of it

notes: Their main damage was Riktor (28k magical); 2/5 of you itemized magic resist.
Enemy ran 1/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Willy Guggenheim (offlane→jungle).

notes: Willy Guggenheim (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.

threats: Chain-CC risk (3 hard-CC abilities, ~2.5s of lockdown): Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s), Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
Your damage is 4/5 physical — predictable; the enemy itemizes one armor item against most of it. A magical pick would split their defenses.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
ourKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
ourKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
ourKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

ourKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
ourKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
ourKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
ourKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing your key CC

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

enemyKits.combo: Dread Nova stun → Ether Crystal push/lift → Particle Shredder channel → Synaptic Obliterator beams
enemyKits.winCondition: poke from max range and zone with the crystal
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline to protect his stationary channel
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Dread Nova; dive him during the immobile ult channel

enemyKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
enemyKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
enemyKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
enemyKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
enemyKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
enemyKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
enemyKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

enemyKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
enemyKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API
